chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Constt: Petition. No.D-603 of 2021. _________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE ___________________________________________________ Before: Mr. Justice Irshad Ali Shah, Mr. Justice Shamsuddin Abbasi, 01. For orders on M.A.No.2744/2021 (U/ A). 02. For orders on office objection “A”. 03. For orders on M.A.No.2745/2021 (E/ A). 04. For hearing of main case. 10.11.2021 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Qureshi, Advocate for the petitioner. = * = * = * = * = * = 01. Urgency granted. 02 to 04. It is mainly contended by learned counsel for the petitioner that the cadres of various employees of Chandka Medical College Hospital, Larkana, have been changed illegally, which is affecting the public service, therefore, they be reverted to their original position with direction to Chief Secretary Sindh, to file statement to the effect that no such action would be taken in future in entire Province of Sindh. The list of such employees annexed with instant petition at Annexure “B”, indicates in its column of “Remarks” that all those employees have been reverted to their original position. If for the sake of arguments, it is believed that they have not yet been reverted to their original position, even then the issue of change of their cadre within same institution being illegal or otherwise, could adequately be taken up by the petitioner (or anyone else being aggrieved), on administrative grounds with the administrative authorities concerned, prior to exhausting the extra ordinary writ jurisdiction of this Court. Consequently, the instant constitutional petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine.
